items.title: Linear regression data flow
items.mermaid:
flowchart LR
  x["features x"]
  Xmat["design matrix X"]
  w["weights w, bias b"]
  yhat["prediction y_hat = Xw + b"]
  ytrue["true y"]
  mse["MSE loss"]
  x --> Xmat --> yhat
  w --> yhat
  yhat --> mse
  ytrue --> mse
items.caption: Labeled (X, y) pairs drive MSE; training adjusts w and b to minimize average squared error.

items.title: Normal equation vs gradient descent
items.mermaid:
flowchart TB
  start["labeled (X, y)"]
  closed["normal equation: w* = (X^T X)^(-1) X^T y"]
  iter["gradient descent: w <- w - eta grad J"]
  same["same OLS minimum when X^T X invertible"]
  start --> closed
  start --> iter
  closed --> same
  iter --> same
items.caption: Two paths to minimize the same MSE objective — direct solve vs iterative updates.

items.title: Geometric projection intuition
items.mermaid:
flowchart TB
  yvec["target vector y in R^n"]
  colspace["column space of X"]
  proj["y_hat = projection of y onto col(X)"]
  resid["residual y - y_hat orthogonal to X"]
  yvec --> proj
  colspace --> proj
  yvec --> resid
  colspace --> resid
items.caption: Least squares picks ŷ in the span of X columns closest to y; residuals are perpendicular to every feature column.
